mechanism: Compressed ROIC-WACC spreads make equity valuations ~1.5-2.0x more sensitive to rate increases through the fundamental earnings channel. This amplifies the contradiction between equity markets pricing negative correlation (bonds as insurance) and rates markets pricing positive correlation (term premium), because the fundamental damage from positive correlation is larger than historical analogues.
regime_dependence: Amplification effect is strongest when spreads are compressed (<5pp); at wider spreads (>8pp), the relationship weakens
